validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hip_api' appears in category at least 1500 times in table events_args
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hip_api' category entries are fewer than expected in events_args
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_args WHERE category = 'rocm_hip_api';

validation_queries.description: Check for missing category entries
validation_queries.error_message: Empty or NULL category entries found in events_args
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events_args WHERE category IS NULL OR TRIM(category) = '';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hip_api' appears in category at least 500 times in table regions
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hip_api' category entries are fewer than expected in regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_hip_api';

validation_queries.description: Ensure there are no HIP API calls that last 0 seconds
validation_queries.error_message: Found HIP API captures where duration is 0
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_hip_api' AND duration = 0;

validation_queries.description: Check for any NULL values in the 'name' column of regions
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in the name column of regions
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hip_api' string is present in the table
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hip_api' string not found in the table rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_hip_api%';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hsa_api' appears in category at least 1000 times in table events_args
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_hsa_api' category entries are fewer than expected in events_args

validation_queries.description: Verify that rocm_hsa_api' appears in category at least 500 times in table regions

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE category = 'rocm_hsa_api' AND duration = 0;

validation_queries.description: Check for any NULL values in the 'name' column of regions

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM regions WHERE name IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_hsa_api' string is present in the table

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_hsa_api%';

validation_queries.description: Check that all IDs are not NULL
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in the id column of memory_allocations
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_allocations WHERE id IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Check the sizes of executed memory allocate calls
validation_queries.error_message: Entries found where allocated size is 0 or NULL
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_allocations WHERE size IS NULL or 0;

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_memory_allocate' appears more than 1 times in category
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_memory_allocate' string appears fewer than 1 times in category column of memory_allocations
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_allocations WHERE category LIKE '%rocm_memory_allocate%';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_memory_allocate' is present in the string column
validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_memory_allocate' string not found in the string column of rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_memory_allocate%';

validation_queries.error_message: 'rocm_memory_copy' string not found in the string column of rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%rocm_memory_copy%';

validation_queries.error_message: 'MEMORY_COPY_DEVICE_TO_HOST' string not found in the string column of rocpd_string
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%MEMORY_COPY_DEVICE_TO_HOST%';

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rocpd_string WHERE string LIKE '%MEMORY_COPY_HOST_TO_DEVICE%';

validation_queries.description: Verify that 'rocm_memory_copy' appears in category column

validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_copies WHERE category LIKE '%rocm_memory_copy%';

validation_queries.description: Check the agents executing memory_copy calls
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found where copied size is 0 or non-existing field
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_copies WHERE size IS NULL or 0;

required_tables.commit: Validation rules for memory_copies - agent verification
required_tables.name: memory_copies

validation_queries.description: Verify that all dst_agent_abs_index values exist in rocpd_info_agent table
validation_queries.error_message: Found dst_agent_abs_index values in memory_copies that do not exist in rocpd_info_agent table
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_copies mc LEFT JOIN rocpd_info_agent ag ON mc.dst_agent_abs_index = ag.absolute_index AND mc.guid = ag.guid WHERE mc.dst_agent_abs_index IS NOT NULL AND ag.absolute_index IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Verify that all src_agent_abs_index values exist in rocpd_info_agent table
validation_queries.error_message: Found src_agent_abs_index values in memory_copies that do not exist in rocpd_info_agent table
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_copies mc LEFT JOIN rocpd_info_agent ag ON mc.src_agent_abs_index = ag.absolute_index AND mc.guid = ag.guid WHERE mc.src_agent_abs_index IS NOT NULL AND ag.absolute_index IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Check that dst_agent_abs_index is not NULL for memory copy operations
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in dst_agent_abs_index column of memory_copies
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_copies WHERE dst_agent_abs_index IS NULL;

validation_queries.description: Check that src_agent_abs_index is not NULL for memory copy operations
validation_queries.error_message: NULL entries found in src_agent_abs_index column of memory_copies
validation_queries.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_copies WHERE src_agent_abs_index IS NULL;
